title: ravenia spectabilis subsp. leonis
intro: Ravenia spectabilis subsp. leonis, also known as the Lion's Ravenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The Lion's Ravenia has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and essential oil extracts, are used in traditional medicine to treat these conditions and promote overall well-being.
